message:
🐛 Fix race condition where demo data flashes before skeleton (#483)

Remove dependency on childDataState for forceSkeletonForOffline calculation.
Previously, the skeleton only showed after the child card reported its state,
causing a brief flash of demo/cached data before skeleton appeared.

Now skeleton displays immediately when:
- Demo mode is OFF globally
- Agent is offline
- Card is not demo-exempt (games)
- Card doesn't explicitly have isDemoData prop

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
